extDescription.message: Deterministic password manager. No vault, no sync — just an algorithm.

setup_intro.message: ItsMyPassword does not store your passwords — it recomputes them from your master password each time. Choose a master you can remember. We cannot recover it.

setup_min_length_error.message: Master password must be at least $LEN$ characters

setup_fingerprint_hint.message: Remember these three symbols — they should appear every time you unlock.

unlock_mismatch_hint.message: Fingerprints don't match — check your master password.

main_no_site.message: Open a website (https://…) to generate a password for it.

main_no_email.message: Type your email above, then click Generate.

options_subtitle.message: Everything stays on this device. We never store generated passwords.

options_default_hint.message: Used on sites without a specific override.

options_autolock_hint.message: The master is wiped from memory after this many minutes. Set to 0 to disable.

options_pin_hint.message: Unlock with a 4–6 digit PIN instead of the full master.

options_pin_warning.message: Activating the PIN stores your master password on this device, encrypted with the PIN. Anyone with your user account and your PIN can derive every password. Cancel if unsure.

options_sites_empty.message: No overrides yet. Sites you customise from the popup show up here.

options_danger_hint.message: Removes the master fingerprint, all overrides, the PIN and the lock settings. Your derived passwords are not stored anywhere — only your memory of the master recovers them.

profile_suffix_label.message: Append a digit and a symbol

profile_counter_hint.message: Bump the counter to rotate a compromised password without changing your master.

badge_locked.message: Locked — click the toolbar icon to unlock.

badge_first_run.message: Open the toolbar icon to set up your master password.

badge_no_domain.message: This page is not a regular website.

badge_no_email.message: Type your email in the form or right here, then I'll generate.

badge_open_extension.message: Open the toolbar icon to set up

history_section_hint.message: Keep an encrypted list of the accounts you have created on each site. Username and site only — passwords are never stored.

history_disable_confirm_body.message: This will permanently delete your saved accounts. This cannot be undone.

history_setup_body.message: When you fill a password through the badge, ItsMyPassword can save the site and username (never the password) so you can find your accounts later. Encrypted with your master password.

detail_missing.message: This account could not be found.

detail_profile_hint.message: These settings are saved on this account only. Changing them never affects other accounts on the same site.

favicon_section_hint.message: When the browser has no cached icon for a domain, ItsMyPassword can ask Google's public favicon service for it. Turn this off to stay 100% local (initials placeholder).

clipboard_section_hint.message: Empty the clipboard automatically after a copied password or username sits there for too long. Resets the timer on each new copy.

rotate_banner_body.message: Rotate your saved password? The new one will be filled and copied.

detail_rotate_hint.message: Bumps the counter and recomputes a fresh password for this account. Use this when a site forces a change or you suspect a leak.

detail_rename_warning_body.message: ItsMyPassword derives the password from your username. Saving will give you a brand-new password — you'll need to update it on the site too.

detail_rename_done_body.message: Don't forget to set the new password on the site as well.
